name: obsidian-epub-reader-plus
description: A polished EPUB reader with paginated navigation and theme-aware reading.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types test/wheelNavigation.test.ts test/paginationLayout.test.ts test/tocNavigation.test.ts test/pageNavigation.test.ts test/readerBackground.test.ts test/publisherStyles.test.ts test/fontSizeAnchor.test.ts test/visibleTextAnchor.test.ts test/releaseSafety.test.ts
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: caronchen
